Min - Max

0.1 - 200 Fun

Game Rules

Gravity is a continuous game that players can join at any time. As soon as the game begins, a meteor starts hurtling from space toward Earth, and the game odd begins to increase from x1.00. The game odd can randomly stop at any time. The game odds are determined using a licensed Random Number Generator (RNG).

The game goal is to click the Cashout button before the odd stops increasing. The game round is considered over when the meteor explodes mid-air.

How to play

To participate in the game, players must pay an entry fee(s) before the start of the round and then wait for the game to begin.

The player wins if they successfully click "Cashout" before the meteor explodes after the round starts.

The player loses if they fail to click “Cashout” before the meteor explodes.

The win is calculated by multiplying the buy-in with the odds at which Cashout was made.

“Auto Cashout”

The player can pre-activate the automatic exit mode (“Auto Cashout”) by entering their preferred odd. In this case, the system automatically withdraws the player from the round when the game odd reaches the amount previously mentioned by the player. However, the player can also click the “Cashout” button at any time and leave the game by winning at the current odd. And if the increase of the game odd stops before reaching the odd selected by the player, then the player loses.

“Auto Bet”

The players can also use the “Auto Bet” mode. To play in the “Auto Bet” mode, the player must enter their preferred amount, activate the “Auto Bet” mode, and select the number of rounds, after which the system will automatically place a bet equivalent to the amount entered by the player during each round. In the “Auto Bet” mode, the player can also pre-activate the automatic exit mode (“Auto Cashout”).

“Cashout 50%”

The player can also click the “Cashout 50%” button and win half of their bet amount, which is calculated by multiplying half of the bet amount by the odd of the “Cashout” made at that moment. The player continues to play using the other half of the bet amount. If the player makes a “Cashout” before the odd stops, they win the second half of the bet amount, which is multiplied by the odd of the “Cashout” made at that moment. In case of not making a “Cashout”, the player loses, losing the second half of their bet. The “Cashout 50%” button is also available in the “Auto Bet” and “Auto Cashout” modes and operates in accordance with the above-mentioned game conditions. The “50% Cashout” mode is regulated in the “Settings” section of the game, i.e., the player can activate or deactivate the specified mode at any time.

The win amount is rounded down to the nearest hundred. Example: 0.218->0.21

RTP-96%

In case of cancellation, the bet is refunded automatically.

In case of malfunction/errors, the win is awarded automatically.
